glosses.es: propietario del bar; propietario del restaurante
glosses.zh-Hans: 酒吧老板; 旅店老板
glosses.yue: 酒吧老闆; 旅店老闆
glosses.pt: dono de bar; dono de restaurante
glosses.vi: chủ quán bar; chủ nhà hàng
glosses.hi: बार का मालिक; रेस्टोरेंट का मालिक
glosses.ja: バーの店主; 宿屋の主人

sentences.target: Der Wirt bringt uns schnell zwei Gläser Wasser.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ vɪʁt bʁɪŋt ʊns ʃnɛl tsvaɪ̯ ˈɡlɛːzɐ ˈvasɐ/

translations.de: Der Wirt bringt uns schnell zwei Gläser Wasser.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ vɪʁt bʁɪŋt ʊns ʃnɛl tsvaɪ̯ ˈɡlɛːzɐ ˈvasɐ/
translations.en: The owner quickly brings us two glasses of water.
translations.es: El dueño nos trae rápidamente dos vasos de agua.
translations.fr: Le patron nous apporte rapidement deux verres d'eau.
translations.it: Il proprietario ci porta rapidamente due bicchieri d'acqua.
translations.ko: 사장님이 우리한테 물 두 잔을 빨리 가져다 줘요.
translations.zh-Hans: 老板很快给我们端来两杯水。
translations.yue: 老闆好快攞嚟兩杯水畀我哋。
translations.ru: Владелец быстро приносит нам два стакана воды.
translations.pt: O dono nos traz rapidamente dois copos de água.
translations.he: הבעלים מביא לנו מהר שני כוסות מים.
translations.tr: Mekan sahibi bize hızlıca iki bardak su getiriyor.
translations.vi: Chủ quán nhanh chóng mang cho chúng tôi hai ly nước.
translations.ar: صاحب المكان يحضر لنا بسرعة كوبين من الماء.
translations.nl: De eigenaar brengt ons snel twee glazen water.
translations.uk: Власник швидко приносить нам дві склянки води.
translations.hu: A tulajdonos gyorsan hoz nekünk két pohár vizet.
translations.hi: मालिक जल्दी से हमें दो गिलास पानी लाकर देता है.
translations.pl: Właściciel szybko przynosi nam dwie szklanki wody.
translations.el: Ο ιδιοκτήτης μας φέρνει γρήγορα δύο ποτήρια νερό.
translations.nb: Eieren kommer raskt med to glass vann til oss.
translations.id: Pemilik dengan cepat membawakan kami dua gelas air.
translations.sv: Ägaren kommer snabbt med två glas vatten till oss.
translations.ro: Patronul ne aduce rapid două pahare cu apă.
translations.cs: Majitel nám rychle přinese dvě sklenice vody.
translations.da: Ejeren kommer hurtigt med to glas vand til os.
translations.fi: Omistaja tuo meille nopeasti kaksi lasia vettä.
translations.ja: 店主がすぐに私たちに水を二杯持ってきてくれる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine, marking the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject (agent), nominative singular masculine.
Finite main verb, present 3rd singular; ditransitive selecting a dative recipient and an accusative theme.
Personal pronoun; dative 1st person plural, indirect object (recipient).
Adverb of manner modifying the verb.
Cardinal numeral quantifying the head noun.
Count noun; accusative plural as the direct object (theme); head of the measure/content NP.
Mass noun; bare nominal complement specifying the content of 'Gläser' (partitive/measure relation).

sentences.target: Der Wirt macht die Musik etwas leiser.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ vɪʁt maxt diː muˈziːk ˈɛtvas ˈlaɪ̯zɐ/

translations.de: Der Wirt macht die Musik etwas leiser.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ vɪʁt maxt diː muˈziːk ˈɛtvas ˈlaɪ̯zɐ/
translations.en: The owner turns the music a bit quieter.
translations.es: El dueño baja un poco la música.
translations.fr: Le patron baisse un peu la musique.
translations.it: Il proprietario abbassa un po' la musica.
translations.zh-Hans: 老板把音乐调低了一点。
translations.pt: O dono abaixa um pouco o volume da música.
translations.tr: Mekan sahibi müziğin sesini biraz kısıyor.
translations.vi: Chủ quán vặn nhỏ nhạc một chút.
translations.ar: صاحب المكان يخفض صوت الموسيقى قليلًا.
translations.nl: De eigenaar zet de muziek een beetje zachter.
translations.hu: A tulajdonos egy kicsit lehalkítja a zenét.
translations.hi: मालिक संगीत की आवाज़ थोड़ा कम करता है.
translations.el: Ο ιδιοκτήτης χαμηλώνει λίγο τη μουσική.
translations.ro: Patronul dă muzica un pic mai încet.
translations.ja: 店主が音楽の音量を少し下げる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine, marking the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject, nominative singular masculine.
Finite main verb, present 3rd singular; causative 'machen' with object and predicative adjective.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine, marking the direct object NP.
Common noun; head of the direct object NP, accusative singular.
Degree adverb modifying the comparative adjective.
Comparative adjective used predicatively as an object complement with 'machen'.

sentences.target: Ich frage den Wirt nach einem freien Tisch.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn vɪʁt naːx ˈaɪ̯nəm ˈfʁaɪ̯ən tɪʃ/

translations.de: Ich frage den Wirt nach einem freien Tisch.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn vɪʁt naːx ˈaɪ̯nəm ˈfʁaɪ̯ən tɪʃ/
translations.en: I ask the owner for a free table.
translations.es: Le pido al dueño una mesa libre.
translations.fr: Je demande au patron s'il y a une table libre.
translations.it: Chiedo al proprietario un tavolo libero.
translations.ru: Я прошу у владельца свободный столик.
translations.pt: Peço ao dono uma mesa livre.
translations.tr: Mekan sahibinden boş bir masa istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi xin chủ quán một bàn trống.
translations.ar: أطلب من صاحب المكان طاولة فارغة.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de eigenaar om een vrije tafel.
translations.uk: Я прошу у власника вільний столик.
translations.hi: मैं मालिक से एक खाली मेज़ माँगता हूँ.
translations.el: Ζητάω από τον ιδιοκτήτη ένα ελεύθερο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Jeg ber eieren om et ledig bord.
translations.id: Saya meminta meja kosong kepada pemilik.
translations.sv: Jag ber ägaren om ett ledigt bord.
translations.ro: Îi cer patronului o masă liberă.
translations.da: Jeg beder ejeren om et ledigt bord.
translations.ja: 私は店主に空いているテーブルを頼む。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative 1st person singular, subject.
Finite main verb, present 1st singular.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine, marking the direct object NP.
Common noun; head of the direct object NP, accusative singular.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the object of inquiry.
Indefinite article; dative singular masculine, determiner of 'Tisch'.
Attributive adjective; dative singular masculine agreeing with 'Tisch'.
Common noun; dative singular masculine as the object of 'nach'.

sentences.target: Unser Wirt schließt heute wegen Krankheit etwas früher.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzɐ vɪʁt ʃliːst ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈveːɡən ˈkʁaŋkhaɪ̯t ˈɛtvas ˈfʁyːɐ̯/

translations.de: Unser Wirt schließt heute wegen Krankheit etwas früher.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzɐ vɪʁt ʃliːst ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈveːɡən ˈkʁaŋkhaɪ̯t ˈɛtvas ˈfʁyːɐ̯/
translations.en: The owner is closing a bit earlier today due to illness.
translations.es: El dueño hoy cierra un poco antes porque está enfermo.
translations.fr: Le patron ferme un peu plus tôt aujourd'hui parce qu'il est malade.
translations.it: Il proprietario oggi chiude un po' prima perché è malato.
translations.ko: 사장님은 아파서 오늘 조금 일찍 문을 닫아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 老板今天因为生病会提前一点打烊。
translations.yue: 老闆因為身體不適，今日會早啲收舖。
translations.ru: Владелец сегодня закрывается чуть раньше из-за болезни.
translations.pt: O dono vai fechar un poco mais cedo hoje porque está doente.
translations.he: הבעלים סוגר היום קצת מוקדם בגלל מחלה.
translations.tr: Mekan sahibi hastalık nedeniyle bugün biraz erken kapatıyor.
translations.vi: Chủ quán hôm nay đóng cửa sớm hơn một chút vì bị bệnh.
translations.ar: صاحب المكان يغلق اليوم مبكرًا قليلًا بسبب المرض.
translations.nl: De eigenaar sluit vandaag wat eerder vanwege ziekte.
translations.uk: Власник сьогодні закривається трохи раніше через хворобу.
translations.hu: A tulajdonos ma betegség miatt egy kicsit korábban zár.
translations.hi: मालिक आज बीमारी की वजह से थोड़ा पहले बंद कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Właściciel dziś zamyka trochę wcześniej z powodu choroby.
translations.el: Ο ιδιοκτήτης σήμερα κλείνει λίγο νωρίτερα λόγω ασθένειας.
translations.nb: Eieren stenger litt tidligere i dag på grunn av sykdom.
translations.id: Pemilik hari ini tutup sedikit lebih awal karena sakit.
translations.sv: Ägaren stänger lite tidigare i dag på grund av sjukdom.
translations.ro: Patronul închide astăzi puțin mai devreme pentru că este bolnav.
translations.cs: Majitel dnes zavírá trochu dřív kvůli nemoci.
translations.da: Ejeren lukker i dag lidt tidligere på grund af sygdom.
translations.fi: Omistaja sulkee tänään hieman aiemmin sairauden takia.
translations.ja: 店主は病気のため今日は少し早く店を閉める。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative singular masculine, marking the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject, nominative singular masculine.
Finite main verb, present 3rd singular; intransitive here meaning 'close up (shop)'.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the event.
Preposition governing genitive; introduces a reason PP.
Common noun; genitive singular as the object of 'wegen' (cause).
Degree adverb modifying the comparative adverb.
Comparative adverb of time giving a relative time (earlier than usual).

es: El dueño nos trae rápidamente dos vasos de agua.
El dueño baja un poco la música.
Le pido al dueño una mesa libre.
El dueño hoy cierra un poco antes porque está enfermo.
fr: Le patron nous apporte rapidement deux verres d'eau.
Le patron baisse un peu la musique.
Je demande au patron s'il y a une table libre.
Le patron ferme un peu plus tôt aujourd'hui parce qu'il est malade.
it: Il proprietario ci porta rapidamente due bicchieri d'acqua.
Il proprietario abbassa un po' la musica.
Chiedo al proprietario un tavolo libero.
Il proprietario oggi chiude un po' prima perché è malato.

Владелец сегодня закрывается чуть раньше из-за болезни.

O dono abaixa um pouco o volume da música.

O dono vai fechar un poco mais cedo hoje porque está doente.
